summary: Backend 5/5 PASS. Frontend content (carousel chapters, hero audio toggle, focus carousel, end CTA) all working when verified on direct page loads, BUT a CRITICAL navigation crash was discovered: clicking ANY nav link (Our Work / Services / Process / About Us / Contact-hash) from the Home page causes a React 'removeChild' runtime error, blanks the entire root, and the destination page never renders. Direct URL loads of every route still work fine.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigating from `/` to any other route via the SPA nav crashes React with NotFoundError: Failed to execute 'removeChild' on 'Node': The node to be removed is not a child of this node. After the click the URL updates but #root becomes empty (rootChildren=0) and an 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay is shown. Verified from `/` → `/our-work`, `/services`, `/process`, `/about` — all four crash. Navigating between non-home routes (e.g. `/our-work` → `/about`) works fine, so the issue is tied to unmounting the Home page. Most likely cause: GallerySection.jsx uses ScrollTrigger with `pin: true` (line 30) which wraps the pinned node in a `pin-spacer` div outside React's reconciliation tree; on unmount React then fails to removeChild. Other Home GSAP/ScrollTrigger components (FullscreenCarousel, RoomJourney, HeroSlideshow) may compound the issue. Fix: ensure every ScrollTrigger created inside Home subtrees is fully killed on unmount (use a single gsap.context per component AND call ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(t=>t.kill()) on Home unmount), or remove `pin: true` / replace with CSS sticky, or call ctx.revert() before route change.

Centre card max scale observed ~1.13 across a 10s window. Spec says 'scale ~1.18 or higher'. Contrast vs edge cards (0.62) is still very clear, so visually fine, but the centre peak is below the documented target.

integration_issues.issue: All nav links from `/` fail to render destination page due to the removeChild crash above. This makes the in-app nav effectively broken from the landing route — a hard refresh recovers the page.

verified_working: POST /api/contact persists in MongoDB; GET /api/contact returns the new record with no _id leak; email_delivered returned in response
Pydantic validation rejects bad email and missing fields (422)
/our-work renders h1 'A portfolio of quiet rooms.'
/process renders h1 'Five chapters, one composed home.'
/about renders h1 'We listen to rooms before we draw them.' with data-testid=about-us-page (when loaded directly)

FullscreenCarousel: all 6 chapters render with correct headings (The Arched Welcome, Marble & Fluted Oak, Daylight Drawing Room, The Working Heart, Linen & Light, The Bronze Sanctuary), body text (~160-230 chars each), and 4 material chips each. Anchors #fc-01..#fc-06 are reachable.
hero-video element present, initial muted=true; hero-audio-toggle click flips muted false → true → false → true (verified via JS click; aria-pressed and label 'Sound On/Off' update accordingly)
Focus carousel: 22 cards rendered, edge cards scaled ~0.62, centre card peaks ~1.13 — clearly larger than edges
Nav has all 5 expected data-testids: nav-link-our-work, nav-link-services, nav-link-process, nav-link-about-us, nav-link-contact
action_items: HIGH/CRITICAL: Fix the removeChild crash when navigating away from `/`. Most likely culprit is GallerySection.jsx ScrollTrigger pin:true. Suggested fixes (any one): (a) Remove `pin: true` and use CSS position:sticky; (b) Ensure each Home child component wraps its GSAP work in `gsap.context(()=>{...}, ref)` and returns `ctx.revert()` in cleanup (FullscreenCarousel already does this — GallerySection and RoomJourney should be audited similarly); (c) On Home unmount, call `ScrollTrigger.getAll().forEach(t=>t.kill())` and `gsap.killTweensOf('*')`; (d) Re-create lenis after route change.
LOW: If the design spec requires the centre focus card to reach scale ~1.18, tune the scale mapping in FocusCarousel (current peak ~1.13).
critical_code_review_comments: GallerySection.jsx uses ScrollTrigger pin:true, which mutates the DOM (pin-spacer wrapper). Combined with React route transitions, this is the most likely cause of the removeChild crash. Audit cleanup.
App.js calls ScrollTrigger.refresh() on location change but never kills triggers from the previous route — stale triggers from Home may still reference unmounted nodes.
FullscreenCarousel correctly uses gsap.context + ctx.revert() in cleanup — good pattern; replicate in GallerySection and RoomJourney.
server.py looks clean: uses motor async, excludes _id in GET /api/contact, validates with Pydantic, returns proper status codes, env-driven config — no issues.

success_rate.frontend: 70% (content & isolated features pass; SPA navigation from Home is broken)

seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_ contact record per test run via POST /api/contact (auto-cleaned per test class is not implemented; records remain in DB with TEST_ prefix for traceability).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_rihara_api.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend critical regression to retest after fix: load `/`, then click each nav-link-* and confirm (1) no pageerror in console, (2) destination data-testid (e.g., about-us-page) renders, (3) Home → / re-entry still works. Use `sessionStorage.setItem('rihara-intro-seen','1')` via add_init_script to skip the 3D door intro.
rca of the issue: Symptom: After clicking any top-nav link from `/`, the browser URL changes but the page goes blank and an 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay appears with: NotFoundError: Failed to execute 'removeChild' on 'Node'. Reproduction: (1) goto `/`, (2) wait for hero/carousel to mount, (3) click [data-testid=nav-link-about-us] (or any other nav link), (4) inspect document — `#root` is empty and pageerror is fired. Root cause: One or more components on the Home page use GSAP ScrollTrigger features that mutate the DOM outside of React (most notably GallerySection.jsx with `pin: true` which inserts a pin-spacer wrapper around its trigger). When React tries to unmount the Home subtree during route transition, it encounters a child it no longer owns and throws removeChild. Mitigation: kill all ScrollTriggers + revert all gsap contexts on Home unmount, OR replace pin:true with CSS position:sticky, OR wrap each GSAP block in gsap.context(..., ref) with ctx.revert() returned from the effect cleanup (FullscreenCarousel already does this correctly — use it as the template).
